cha_list.desc:
Win a case of not-sold-in-stores Switch the Chobani Flip Cookie Dough! It’s the flavor you love, only opposite—with more sweet dough than ever. To enter the #SwitchTheChobaniFlip challenge, follow these steps synched to Missy Elliott’s *Work It*:

1. *Put my thang down*—slam something on a table or surface.
2. *Flip it*—toss it in the air.
3. *And reverse it*—reverse step 2 using TikTok’s editing feature.

Get creative! Good luck and have fun! FYI—entries must include Chobani Flip to win.
